explanations.2: This uses a CSS custom property (a variable defined elsewhere) to set the border color, so the color stays consistent across the whole site if it's changed in one place.
explanations.5: Overflow hidden means if content inside this container is too big, it gets cut off at the edges instead of spilling out.
explanations.22: Overflow auto means if the content inside gets too tall (over 400px), scrollbars will appear so users can still see everything.
